PowerShell("=== Running containers ==="; docker ps --format "{{.Names}} \({{.Status}}\)"; "=== All containers \(incl. stopped\) ==="; docker ps -a --format "{{.Names}} \({{.Status}}\)"; "=== Volume count ==="; \(docker volume ls -q | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
PowerShell("=== Removing all containers ==="; docker rm -f $\(docker ps -aq\); "=== Containers remaining ==="; \(docker ps -aq | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)

PowerShell("=== Volumes before ==="; \(docker volume ls -q | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; "=== Pruning all volumes ==="; docker volume prune -a -f; "=== Volumes remaining ==="; \(docker volume ls -q | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)

PowerShell("=== Docker disk usage \(what Docker thinks it's using\) ==="; docker system df; "`n=== Largest items under %LOCALAPPDATA%\\Docker ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 | ForEach-Object { "{0,10:N2} GB  {1}" -f \($_.Length/1GB\), $_.FullName })
PowerShell("=== Purging all images, build cache, networks ===")

PowerShell("=== Quitting Docker Desktop and backend processes ==="; Get-Process -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Docker Desktop|com\\.docker' } | ForEach-Object { "stopping $\($_.Name\) \(pid $\($_.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; "=== Shutting down WSL ==="; wsl --shutdown; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; "=== WSL state ==="; wsl --list --verbose)

PowerShell($id = [Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent\(\); $p = New-Object Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal\($id\); $admin = $p.IsInRole\([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator\); "Elevated \(admin\): $admin"; "User: $\($id.Name\)"; $f = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\wsl\\disk\\docker_data.vhdx"; $fi = Get-Item $f; "VHDX size now: {0:N2} GB" -f \($fi.Length/1GB\); "Optimize-VHD available: " + [bool]\(Get-Command Optimize-VHD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\))

PowerShell("=== Converting docker_data.vhdx to sparse \(compacts empty space\) ==="; wsl --manage docker-desktop --set-sparse true; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $f = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\wsl\\disk\\docker_data.vhdx"; $fi = Get-Item $f; "VHDX size after: {0:N2} GB" -f \($fi.Length/1GB\))
